title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VRL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
